case_title: POTRERO COURT PARTNERS L.P., A CALIF GRAL PARTNERS et al vs. YOUNG, DAVID AKA DAVID M YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNG, DAVID AKA DAVID M YOUNG

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/RONALD ARLAS AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIP- ULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2225 23RD ST, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY,BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 9-29-93 - DEF.AGREES TO VACATE BY MIDNIGHT 9-28-93 RENT & DAMAGES OF $2,126 (JULY TO TODAY) - $485 ATTY FEES - $105 COURT COSTS - PL. RECEIVED $860 CASHIERS CHECK TODAY, LEAVING A BALANCE OF $1,856 - IF DEF. VACATES BY 9-28-93, PL WILL WAIVE $485 ATTY FEES, LEAVING A BALANCE OF $1,371 - $400 SECURITY DEPOSIT WILL BE CREDITED TO BAL. OWED - THE REMAINING BALANCE TO BE PD AT $200 MO. STARTING 11-15-93 & EACH SUCCEEDING MONTH ON THE 15TH - DEF. STATES HE IS THE SOLE ADULT OCCUPANT OF PREMISES - ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED - DEF. WAIVES ANY FURTHER STAYS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, DAVID AKA DAVID M YOUNG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2225 23RD ST, #110, S.F, CA. $2,126.00 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,716.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-29-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, DEF. PD $860 DAY OF TRIAL. $485 ATTY FEES WVD IF DEF VACATES BY MIDNIGHT 9-28-93. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
